summary: Comprehensive testing of DawaLink Document Upload & Admin Review features completed. All 12 backend API tests passed, frontend registration flow with document upload verified, admin dashboard pending users with documents display working, reject modal with reason and document checkboxes functional, login rejection info display confirmed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/upload/temp-document returns doc_id, stored_name - PASS
Backend: GET /api/documents/file/{stored_name} returns file - PASS
Backend: POST /api/auth/register/pharmacy accepts document_ids array - PASS
Backend: POST /api/auth/register/supplier accepts document_ids array - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/pending includes documents array per user - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/review approve flow - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/review reject with reason and documents - PASS
Backend: Login rejected user returns 403 with rejection_info - PASS
Backend: Re-registration with same email after rejection - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/documents returns user's documents - PASS
Backend: Invalid file format upload rejection - PASS
Backend: 404 for non-existent document file - PASS
Frontend: Landing page with Je suis Pharmacie/Fournisseur buttons - PASS
Frontend: Registration Step 1 (Informations) form - PASS
Frontend: Registration Step 2 (Documents) with 3 required docs (Pharmacy: Agrément de pharmacie, Registre de Commerce, Inscription à l'ordre des pharmaciens) - PASS
Frontend: Document upload buttons with Télécharger labels - PASS
Frontend: Admin Dashboard login and navigation - PASS
Frontend: Admin pending users page shows Documents soumis section with document links - PASS
Frontend: Admin reject button opens modal with rejection reason textarea - PASS
Frontend: Admin reject modal has document checkboxes - PASS
Frontend: Login page shows rejection info (Compte rejeté, Raison, Document(s) concerné(s)) - PASS
Frontend: Login page has Se réinscrire avec de nouveaux documents button - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: All 12 requested features are implemented and working correctly
Backend APIs properly handle document upload, linking to users, and admin review flow
Frontend RegistrationFlow.tsx has 3-step wizard (Informations -> Documents -> Vérification)
Admin NewAdminDashboard.tsx shows pending users with documents and has full reject modal
LoginPage.tsx correctly displays structured rejection info with reason and rejected documents
Email sending is logged (RESEND_API_KEY not configured) but notification stored in DB
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during backend testing with documents uploaded, some approved, some rejected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document upload/review feature fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_document_upload_review.py cover all CRUD operations. Frontend tested via Playwright for registration flow, admin pending users page with documents, reject modal, and login rejection info display. All features working correctly - no issues found.

document_upload_endpoint.details: POST /api/upload/temp-document accepts file + doc_type, returns doc_id, stored_name

registration_with_documents.details: Both pharmacy and supplier registration accept document_ids array and link documents to user

admin_pending_users_with_documents.details: GET /api/admin/users/pending returns users with documents array containing doc_type, file_name, stored_name, status

admin_review_endpoint.details: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/review with approved/rejected decision, rejection_reason, rejected_documents

rejected_user_login.details: 403 response with structured error containing rejection_info (rejection_reason, rejected_documents, reviewed_at)

re_registration.details: Registering with same email after rejection overwrites the rejected account

frontend_registration_document_step.details: Step 2 shows 3 required documents with Télécharger buttons (Agrément de pharmacie, Registre de Commerce, Inscription à l'ordre des pharmaciens for pharmacy)

frontend_admin_pending_documents.details: Admin pending users section shows 'Documents soumis (N)' with document links and download icons

frontend_admin_reject_modal.details: Reject button opens modal with rejection reason textarea and document checkboxes

frontend_login_rejection_display.details: Login page shows structured rejection info with Compte rejeté header, Raison, Document(s) concerné(s), and Se réinscrire button

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending via Resend API is NOT MOCKED but RESEND_API_KEY is not configured, so emails are logged to console and stored in notifications collection instead of being sent
